systems.system_notes: Cemented hemiarthroplasty construct anchored to official Zimmer Biomet CPT stem materials with bipolar head compatibility inferred only at component-family level.

trays.tray_notes: Official CPT stem materials support a dedicated cemented hip stem instrumentation workflow applicable to the hemiarthroplasty construct.

components.component_notes: Official CPT materials describe the polished taper cemented femoral stem family.
Bipolar femoral head component used with the cemented CPT hemiarthroplasty construct.
Inner modular femoral head component compatible with the CPT 12/14 taper within the bipolar construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current source material confirms the CPT stem family but does not provide a clean Zimmer Biomet bipolar-head code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper hemiarthroplasty catalogue or bipolar-head implant listing pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
